items.name: browser-window
items.title: Browser Window
items.description: A compact browser chrome frame for screenshots and previews.

items.name: cookie-consent
items.title: Cookie Consent
items.description: A compact cookie consent card with pluggable accept and decline handlers.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: A button that copies text to the clipboard with built-in success feedback.

items.name: copyable-field
items.title: Copyable Field
items.description: A selectable, horizontally scrollable field with a copy action.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: A scroll container with overlay scrollbars and automatic edge fades.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A keyboard-navigable multi-step flow with flexible triggers and panels.

items.name: tipover
items.title: Tipover
items.description: A touch-friendly tooltip that falls back to a popover on coarse pointers.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: An opinionated toast manager and toaster built on Base UI with a Sonner-adjacent API.

items.name: video-player
items.title: Video Player
items.description: A themed media-chrome video player with composable controls.
